title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited family as a Risk Analyst in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited!
